---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a scenario, benchmark, world-model improvement, or doc enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What gap does this fill?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature at a high level.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes (if code changed)

## Estimated difficulty

- [ ] S (&lt;1 hour) — good first issue
- [ ] M (half day)
- [ ] L (multi-day — open an issue for discussion first)

## Alternatives considered

Optional.

## Additional context

Links, papers, or related issues.
